SAKURAMOD-GENERIC.manifestPrompt: Choose a Clear Card to manifest.
SAKURAMOD-GALE.title: Gale
SAKURAMOD-GALE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Deal {ReleaseDamage:diff()} damage again. Draw {ReleaseDraw:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-REFLECT.title: Reflect
SAKURAMOD-REFLECT.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {UpgradeBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
|}The next time your [gold]Block[/gold] prevents attack damage, [gold]Reflect[/gold] half of it, rounded up.
[gold]Release:[/gold] [gold]Reflect[/gold] all of it instead.
SAKURAMOD-FLIGHT.title: Flight
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_WAND.title: Dream Wand
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_WAND.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} Clear Card in your hand. It gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn and costs 1 less this turn.
SAKURAMOD-ACTION.title: Action
SAKURAMOD-ACTION.description:
Exhaust 1 card in your hand. [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Manifested cards cost 0 this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Draw {ReleaseDraw:diff()} card(s).
SAKURAMOD-APPEAR.title: Appear
SAKURAMOD-APPEAR.description:
[gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Cards Manifested this way cost {ReleaseDiscount:diff()} less this turn.
SAKURAMOD-AQUA.title: Aqua
SAKURAMOD-AQUA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release:[/gold] For each enemy, +{FrostbiteDamage:diff()} damage per 10 [gold]Frostbite[/gold], then double its [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-BLADE.title: Blade
SAKURAMOD-BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {BaseHits:diff()} times. If a card gained [gold]Release[/gold] this turn, attack 1 additional time.
[gold]Release:[/gold] For each card that gained [gold]Release[/gold] this turn, attack 1 additional time.
SAKURAMOD-HAIL.title: Hail
SAKURAMOD-HAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy 3 times. Each hit applies {SakuraFrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Hit one additional time.
SAKURAMOD-LUCID.title: Lucid
SAKURAMOD-LUCID.description:
Look at the top {Look:diff()} cards of your draw pile. Put 1 into your hand.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Your next Attack this turn ignores enemy [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SHADE.title: Shade
SAKURAMOD-SHADE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Retain your [gold]Block[/gold] until next turn.
SAKURAMOD-SIEGE.title: Siege
SAKURAMOD-SIEGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Gain {ReleaseBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-SWING.title: Swing
SAKURAMOD-SWING.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. For each [gold]Weak[/gold] on an enemy, damage is increased by {WeakDamage:diff()}.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Double the [gold]Weak[/gold] damage bonus.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COMPASS.title: Dream Compass
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COMPASS.description: Choose a Clear Card from your draw pile and put it into your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: It gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.title: Stabilize
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.description: [gold]Stabilize[/gold] 1 card. Draw 1 card.{IfUpgraded:show: It costs 0 this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-ROLLERBLADE_DASH.title: Rollerblade Dash
SAKURAMOD-ROLLERBLADE_DASH.description: If you have not [gold]Manifested[/gold] this turn, [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Otherwise, the next card you play this turn is played 1 additional time.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_BARRIER.title: Magic Barrier
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_BARRIER.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {TemporaryBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each [red]Temporary[/red] card in your hand.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_ADVICE.title: Kero Advice
SAKURAMOD-KERO_ADVICE.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). If you draw a Clear Card, 1 of them costs 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_COSTUME.title: Tomoyo Costume
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_COSTUME.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose a [red]Temporary[/red] Clear Card in your hand. It gains [gold]Retain[/gold], and its [red]Temporary[/red] removal is delayed by {Delay:diff()} turn.
SAKURAMOD-COSTUME_POCKET.title: Costume Pocket
SAKURAMOD-COSTUME_POCKET.description: Draw 1 card. If it is a Skill, it costs 0 this turn. Otherwise, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-BREAK.title: Break
SAKURAMOD-BREAK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has [gold]Block[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show:remove its [gold]Block[/gold], then |}deal double.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Remove 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold] and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE.title: Choice
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE.description:
Choose: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}; or draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
[gold]Release:[/gold] Do the chosen option twice.
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE_MANIFEST_CHOICE.title: Manifest
SAKURAMOD-CHOICE_DRAW_CHOICE.title: Draw
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE.title: Promise
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Next turn, if you did not lose HP, [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}.
[gold]Release:[/gold] [gold]Manifest[/gold] {ReleaseCards:diff()} additional card.
SAKURAMOD-STRUGGLE.title: Struggle
SAKURAMOD-STRUGGLE.description:
Discard your hand. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Deal it X plus the number of discarded cards times instead.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME.title: Dream Costume
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME.description: The first [red]Temporary[/red] card you play each turn costs 1 less.
SAKURAMOD-BLAZE.title: Blaze
SAKURAMOD-BLAZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each [red]Temporary[/red] card played previously this turn, damage is increased by {TemporaryDamage:diff()}.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Double this damage increase.
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING.title: Dreaming
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING.description:
At the start of your turn, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1.
[gold]Release:[/gold] [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1 now.
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION.title: Gravitation
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION.description:
ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] The next {ReleaseReturns:diff()} cards that would enter your discard pile this turn return to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE.title: Mirage
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE.description:
Gain {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold]. {IfUpgraded:show:Add 1 Mirage Image to the top of your draw pile.|Add 1 Mirage Image to your discard pile.}
[gold]Release:[/gold] Add it to your hand instead. It gains [gold]Retain[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE.title: Mirage Image
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE.description: The next time you would take attack damage this turn, reduce it by {MirageImagePower:diff()}.
SAKURAMOD-RECORD.title: Record
SAKURAMOD-RECORD.description:
Choose another Transparent Card you have played this combat. Add a [red]Temporary[/red] copy to your hand. It costs 1 less this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] If nothing is saved, save your HP and Block; otherwise set your HP and Block to the saved values.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_RECON.title: Kero Recon
SAKURAMOD-KERO_RECON.selectionPrompt: Choose up to {MaxCount} card(s) to Exhaust.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_RECON.description: Look at the top {Look:diff()} cards of your draw pile. Exhaust any number of them.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BREAK.title: Kero Snack Break
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BREAK.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Draw 1 card. |}Gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold]. If you previously played a [gold]Released[/gold] card this turn, draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND.title: Kero Bond
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND.description: Increase your maximum hand size by {KeroBondPower:diff()}. Each turn, after the first Clear Card you play, draw {KeroBondPower:diff()} cards.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_DESIGN.title: Tomoyo Design
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_DESIGN.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose a Clear Card in hand. It gains [gold]Release[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
At the start of your turn, a {IfUpgraded:show:chosen|random} Clear Card in your hand gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn. The first time each turn you play a [gold]Released[/gold] card, trigger this again.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING.title: Magic Awakening
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Manifest[/gold] {MagicAwakeningPower:diff()}.
SAKURAMOD-EXCHANGE.title: Exchange
SAKURAMOD-EXCHANGE.description:
Draw 1 card. Choose 2 cards in hand. Exchange their [red]Temporary[/red] states and {IfUpgraded:show:combat-long|this-turn} costs.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Also exchange [gold]Release[/gold] states.
SAKURAMOD-KINDNESS.title: Kindness
SAKURAMOD-KINDNESS.description:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. Discover 1 {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}Partner card and add it to your hand.
[gold]Release:[/gold] It costs 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-LABYRINTH.title: Labyrinth
SAKURAMOD-LABYRINTH.description:
Stun 1 enemy.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Stun ALL enemies instead.
SAKURAMOD-REPAIR.title: Repair
SAKURAMOD-REPAIR.description:
Gain {SakuraRegenerationPower:diff()} [gold]Regeneration[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Put an exhausted Clear Card on top of your draw pile.
SAKURAMOD-REVERSAL.title: Reversal
SAKURAMOD-REVERSAL.description:
Exchange your draw pile and discard pile. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Draw {ReleaseDraw:diff()} additional card(s).
SAKURAMOD-REWIND.title: Rewind
SAKURAMOD-REWIND.description:
Choose a card from your exhaust pile and return it to your hand.
[gold]Release:[/gold] It costs 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-SNOOZE.title: Snooze
SAKURAMOD-SPIRAL.title: Spiral
SAKURAMOD-SPIRAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each Spiral played previously this combat, deal {SpiralDamage:diff()} additional damage.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Add 1 [red]Temporary[/red] Spiral to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-TRANSFER.title: Transfer
SAKURAMOD-TRANSFER.description:
An enemy loses {EnemyStrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Gain {StrengthGain:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityGain:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] No longer [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_TEA.title: Akiho Tea
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_TEA.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then discard 1 card. If you discarded a Clear Card, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1.
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_DREAM.title: Akiho's Dream
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_DREAM.description: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile. At the start of your next turn, draw 1 card.{IfUpgraded:show: Manifested cards cost 1 less this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-CLOCK_COUNTRY_ALICE.title: Alice in Clockland
SAKURAMOD-CLOCK_COUNTRY_ALICE.descriptio: Whenever a [red]Temporary[/red] card is removed from combat, record its damage and Block. At the start of your next turn, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:Reading+|Reading} to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-ALICE_READING.title: Reading
SAKURAMOD-ALICE_READING.description: Release all stored values as damage and Block. Clear them after playing.{IfUpgraded:show: Draw {Cards:diff()} card.|}
SAKURAMOD-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.title: Forbidden Magic
SAKURAMOD-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.selectionPromp: Choose up to {MaxCount} Clear Cards to gain Temporary.
SAKURAMOD-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.description: Choose up to {MaxCards:diff()} non-[red]Temporary[/red] Clear Cards in your hand. They gain [red]Temporary[/red]. For each card that gains [red]Temporary[/red], gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-D_WATCH.title: D's Pocket Watch
SAKURAMOD-D_WATCH.description: Choose a non-[red]Temporary[/red] card from your discard pile and return it to your hand. It costs 0 this turn and gains [red]Temporary[/red].
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE.title: False Daily Life
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE.description: Whenever a card gains [red]Temporary[/red], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. Whenever a [red]Temporary[/red] card is removed from combat, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-STARLIGHT_CHANT.title: Starlight Chant
SAKURAMOD-STARLIGHT_CHANT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each card in your [gold]Catalog[/gold], deal {CatalogDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURAMOD-ARCHIVE.title: Archive
SAKURAMOD-GROWING_MAGIC.title: Growing Magic
SAKURAMOD-RELEASE_CHANT.title: Release Chant
SAKURAMOD-RELEASE_CHANT.description: Choose a Clear Card in hand. It gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-CARD_BOOK_SORTING.title: Card Book Sorting
SAKURAMOD-CARD_BOOK_SORTING.selectionPro: Choose up to {MaxCount} card(s) to Stabilize.
SAKURAMOD-CARD_BOOK_SORTING.description: [gold]Stabilize[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} cards. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]Stabilized[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-NEW_PAGE.title: New Page
SAKURAMOD-NEW_PAGE.description: Whenever you [gold]Stabilize[/gold] a card, draw {NewPagePower:diff()} card.{IfUpgraded:show: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] too.|}
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_MAGIC.title: Nameless Magic
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_MAGIC.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} x [gold]Catalog[/gold] damage to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-CHAIN_PHENOMENON.title: Chain Phenomenon
SAKURAMOD-CHAIN_PHENOMENON.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each other Clear Card played previously this turn, deal {ClearDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_SURGE.title: Magic Surge
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_SURGE.description: Each turn, the first time you [gold]Manifest[/gold], [gold]Manifest[/gold] {MagicSurgePower:diff()} additional card.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_TUNING.title: Magic Tuning
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_TUNING.description: Choose a Clear Card in hand. If it is [red]Temporary[/red], [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it. Otherwise, it gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_WAND_COMBO.title: Kero Fire Breath
SAKURAMOD-COMPASS_TRACKING.title: Compass Tracking
SAKURAMOD-COMPASS_TRACKING.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each different Element played this turn, deal {ElementDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURAMOD-THUNDER_EMPEROR_SUMMON.title: Thunder Emperor Summon
SAKURAMOD-THUNDER_EMPEROR_SUMMON.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. This card counts as [gold]Wind[/gold] and [gold]Fire[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-MEILING_COMBO_KICK.title: Meiling Combo Kick
SAKURAMOD-MEILING_COMBO_KICK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times. Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Add a [red]Temporary[/red] [gold]Released[/gold] Struggle to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-TALISMAN_COMBO.title: Talisman Combo
SAKURAMOD-TALISMAN_COMBO.description: For each different Element you played this turn, trigger its talisman effect: [gold]Wind[/gold] draws {WindDraw:diff()}, [gold]Water[/gold] applies {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Fire[/gold] deals {FireDamage:diff()} damage, [gold]Earth[/gold] gains {EarthBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SILVER_MOON_WING.title: Silver Moon Wing
SAKURAMOD-SILVER_MOON_WING.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you previously played a [gold]Released[/gold] card this turn, gain {ReleaseBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-BIG_BROTHER_SENSE.title: Big Brother Sense
SAKURAMOD-BIG_BROTHER_SENSE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If any enemy intends to attack, gain {AttackBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] instead.
SAKURAMOD-YUKITO_LUNCH_BOX.title: Yukito Lunch Box
SAKURAMOD-MOMO_CONTRACT.title: Momo Contract
SAKURAMOD-MOMO_CONTRACT.description: Choose a [red]Temporary[/red] card in hand. [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it and it gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-YAMAZAKI_TALL_TALE.title: Yamazaki Tall Tale
SAKURAMOD-YAMAZAKI_TALL_TALE.description: Choose a [red]Temporary[/red] card in hand. Add a [red]Temporary[/red] copy to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: The copy costs 0 this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-ERIOL_PHONE_CALL.title: Eriol Phone Call
SAKURAMOD-ERIOL_PHONE_CALL.description: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Choose a Clear Card in hand. It gains [gold]Release[/gold] for this combat. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show: The Manifested card costs 0 this turn.|}
SAKURAMOD-FUJITAKA_NOTE.title: Fujitaka Note
SAKURAMOD-FUJITAKA_NOTE.selectionPrompt: Choose up to {MaxCount} card to discard.
SAKURAMOD-FUJITAKA_NOTE.description: Look at the top {Look:diff()} cards of your draw pile. You may discard 1 of them. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-NAOKO_GHOST_STORY.title: Naoko Ghost Story
SAKURAMOD-NAOKO_GHOST_STORY.description: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. If the Manifested card is not in your [gold]Catalog[/gold], draw {Draw:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_TALISMAN.title: Syaoran Talisman
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_TALISMAN.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each Element played this turn, trigger its effect: [gold]Wind[/gold] draws {WindDraw:diff()}, [gold]Water[/gold] applies {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Fire[/gold] deals {FireDamage:diff()} damage, [gold]Earth[/gold] gains {EarthBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-DAOIST_SUPPORT.title: Daoist Support
SAKURAMOD-DAOIST_SUPPORT.description: Choose a Clear Card in hand. It counts as all Elements this turn.{IfUpgraded:show: Draw {Cards:diff()} card.|}
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND.title: Syaoran Bond
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND.description: Each turn, the first time you play each Element, trigger its effect: [gold]Wind[/gold] draws {WindDraw:diff()}, [gold]Water[/gold] applies {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Fire[/gold] deals {FireDamage:diff()} damage, [gold]Earth[/gold] gains {EarthBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_CAMERA.title: Tomoyo Camera
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_CAMERA.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards you played this turn. Add [red]Temporary[/red] copies to your hand. If they are Partner Cards, they cost 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND.title: Tomoyo Bond
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND.description: Whenever you play 2 Clear Cards, gain {TomoyoBondPower:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_GLOW.title: Dream Key Glow
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_GLOW.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. The Manifested card gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-BLANK.title: Blank
SAKURAMOD-BLANK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Exhaust all Status and Curse cards from your hand, draw pile, and discard pile.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Remove your debuffs and enemy buffs. Draw 1 for each card exhausted this way.
SAKURAMOD-MIRROR.title: Mirror
SAKURAMOD-MIRROR.description:
Choose a card in hand. It gains {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Replay[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] It gains {ReleaseRepeat:diff()} additional [gold]Replay[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-REMIND.title: Remind
SAKURAMOD-REMIND.description:
Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards removed by [red]Temporary[/red] this combat. Add copies to your hand. If there are none, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1.
[gold]Release:[/gold] The copies cost 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-SYNCHRONIZE.title: Synchronize
SAKURAMOD-SYNCHRONIZE.description:
Choose 2 Clear Cards in hand. This turn, when you play either one, automatically play the other.
[gold]Release:[/gold] If one is [gold]Released[/gold], both gain [gold]Release[/gold] this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TIME.title: Time
SAKURAMOD-TIME.description:
End your turn. Take an extra turn.
[gold]Release:[/gold] Keep your current [gold]Block[/gold] for that extra turn.
SAKURAMOD-TRUE_OR_FALSE.title: True or False
SAKURAMOD-TRUE_OR_FALSE.description:
Choose: another card in hand gains [red]Temporary[/red] and draw {Cards:diff()} cards; or [gold]Stabilize[/gold] 1 card and gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
[gold]Release:[/gold] Do both.
SAKURAMOD-TRUE_OR_FALSE_DRAW_CHOICE.desc: Another card in hand gains [red]Temporary[/red]. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND.title: Star Wand
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Released[/gold] card, gain 1 Star. At 2 Star, spend 2 Star to draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SEALED_BOOK.title: Sealed Book
SAKURAMOD-SEALED_BOOK.description: Choose a [gold]Released[/gold] card in hand. [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it and give it permanent [gold]Release[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE.title: Dream Key Resonance
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE.descriptio: At end of turn, choose a [red]Temporary[/red] card in combat and [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it.
